input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.4.1
            TITLE: the glv system must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.4.1: The GLV System must be:
EV.4.4.1 The GLV System must be: 
a. A Low Voltage system that is Grounded to the Chassis 
b. Able to operate with Accumulator removed from the vehicle

final_answer: EV.4.4.1 The GLV System must be: a. A Low Voltage system that is Grounded to the Chassis b. Able to operate with Accumulator removed from the vehicle
